tasks.subject: Task 1: Create feature branch
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Establish the working branch so no changes land on `main` unreviewed.

**Files:**
- No file changes.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Branch `feature/mobile-layout-redesign` exists and is checked out.
- [ ] `git status` shows clean working tree on the new branch.

**Verify:** `git branch --show-current` → `feature/mobile-layout-redesign`

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "git branch --show-current", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Branch feature/mobile-layout-redesign is checked out", "git status shows clean working tree"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add mobile HTML elements
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Insert `.mobile-topbar` and `.mobile-bottom-nav` into `index.html` and add base CSS to hide them on desktop.

**Files:**
- Modify: `index.html`
- Modify: `style.css`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `.mobile-topbar` is in the DOM directly before `<nav id="my-nav">`.
- [ ] `.mobile-topbar` has `.mobile-topbar-brand` and `.mobile-topbar-nameplate` children, each with a `.theme-toggle` button.
- [ ] `.mobile-bottom-nav` is in the DOM directly after `</main>`.
- [ ] `.mobile-bottom-nav` has three `<a>` elements with `data-section` of `experience`, `education`, `projects`.
- [ ] Both new elements are hidden on desktop.

**Verify:** Open `index.html` in desktop browser → elements invisible; inspect DOM → elements present.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["index.html", "style.css"], "verifyCommand": "open index.html in browser and inspect DOM", "acceptanceCriteria": [".mobile-topbar present before #my-nav", ".mobile-bottom-nav present after </main>", "both hidden on desktop"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Add mobile CSS
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Write all `@media (max-width: 767px)` rules for scroll-snap, mobile topbar two-state toggle, and B1a bottom nav.

**Files:**
- Modify: `style.css` — append new `@media (max-width: 767px)` block

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `#my-nav` hidden on 375px viewport.
- [ ] `.mobile-topbar` fixed at top 48px, shows brand state by default.
- [ ] `body.off-hero` class switches topbar to nameplate state.
- [ ] `.mobile-bottom-nav` fixed at bottom 48px.
- [ ] `.active` on a nav item shows indicator line.
- [ ] Sections snap on scroll in DevTools mobile emulation.

**Verify:** Chrome DevTools → 375px → scroll between sections.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["style.css"], "verifyCommand": "Chrome DevTools mobile 375px — scroll between sections", "acceptanceCriteria": ["#my-nav hidden on mobile", "mobile-topbar fixed top 48px", "mobile-bottom-nav fixed bottom 48px", "scroll-snap-type y mandatory on html", "sections snap"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Add mobile JavaScript
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace theme-toggle JS to sync all `.theme-toggle` buttons; add IntersectionObserver for topbar state and bottom nav active class.

**Files:**
- Modify: `index.html` — replace theme-toggle script block; append IntersectionObserver IIFE

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] All three `.theme-toggle` buttons sync on click.
- [ ] On hero: `body.off-hero` absent, no active bottom nav item.
- [ ] On experience: `body.off-hero` present, `[data-section="experience"]` has `active`.
- [ ] On education: `[data-section="education"]` has `active`.
- [ ] On projects: `[data-section="projects"]` has `active`.
- [ ] Resize to >767px: `body.off-hero` removed, all `.active` removed.

**Verify:** Chrome DevTools → mobile 375px → scroll all 4 sections; check body class and nav active state in Elements panel.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["index.html"], "verifyCommand": "Chrome DevTools mobile 375px — scroll all 4 sections and check body class + nav active state", "acceptanceCriteria": ["All .theme-toggle buttons sync", "body.off-hero added/removed correctly", "correct .active class per section", "teardown on resize >767px"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Merge to main
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Merge the completed feature branch into `main`.

**Files:**
- No file changes.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `feature/mobile-layout-redesign` merged into `main`.
- [ ] All three feature commits present on `main`.
- [ ] Feature branch deleted.

**Verify:** `git log main --oneline -5` → three feature commits at top.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "git log main --oneline -5", "acceptanceCriteria": ["feature branch merged to main", "feature branch deleted"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```
